file:            spec/swagger.yaml
branch:          master
commit_sha:      edc6c1e1e825895797e456be3264a27cd3b7903a
upstream_date:   2024-05-30  (this file has been static for ~2 years —
                 we treat it as a vendored fossil, not a moving target)
fetched_at:      2026-06-01T08:00:23Z
fetched_size:    183438 bytes
sha256:          061b6b092458c906fbd7413abf79b07cbbe484b9c3de2142e5d8b134479b03b4

spec_version:    swagger 2.0
api_version:     v2  (NOTE: TradeStation marks v3 as recommended; the v2
                 swagger here is the only published spec we found. The v3
                 swagger lives behind auth at https://api.tradestation.com/v3/swagger.json
                 — 401 without a Bearer token. See docs/09-codegen-strategy.md
                 for how we treat this two-track situation.)
